ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN number of the journal */,
  "quartile" INTEGER /* Quartile ranking of the journal */,
  "subject_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject area the journal belongs to */,
  "journal_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the journal */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the journal is published */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the journal is published */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Whether the journal is open-access or not */,
  "article_processing_charge" REAL /* Article processing charge of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_subject_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_area_id") REFERENCES subject_areas ("subject_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "publisher_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_areas" (
  "subject_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject area */,
  "subject_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject area */,
  "subject_area_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subject area */,
  "parent_subject_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subject area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal subscription */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being subscribed to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department or research group subscribing to the journal */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription */,
  "subscription_cost" REAL /* Annual cost of the subscription */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is up for renewal */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription was cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_subscriptions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_subscriptions_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department or research group */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department or research group */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty that the department belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_metrics_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the journal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the journal */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the journal was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal submission */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the submission is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the article */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the peer review */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission */,
  "submission_file" TEXT /* File submitted by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_submissions_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peer review */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal submission being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "review_decision" TEXT /* Decision made based on the review */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review */,
  "review_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_reviews_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES journal_submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
